transactions.desc: The Diamondbacks recalled Jameson from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Strowd to Triple-A Reno following Friday's game against the Nationals.
The Orioles designated Wilson for assignment Saturday.
The Orioles selected Huff's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Saturday.
The Cubs optioned Roberts to Triple-A Iowa on Saturday, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
The Cubs recalled Assad from Triple-A Iowa on Saturday, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
The Twins designated Outman for assignment Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Twins recalled Lewis from Triple-A St. Paul on Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Astros released Thomas on Friday.
The Yankees optioned Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre after Friday's loss to the Red Sox.
The Rockies recalled Agnos from Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday.
The Padres released Castellanos on Friday.
The Padres reinstated Brito (forearm) from the injured list Friday and optioned him to Triple-A El Paso.
The Padres recalled Morgan from Triple-A El Paso on Friday.
The Angels signed Porter to a minor-league contract Friday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Angels designated Anderson for assignment Friday.
The Angels selected Natera's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Brewers recalled Fitzpatrick from Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
The Brewers recalled Yoho from Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
The Brewers designated Woodford for assignment Friday, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Diamondbacks designated Rashi for assignment Friday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Fernandez to Triple-A Reno on Friday.
The Diamondbacks selected Groover's contract from Triple-A Reno on Friday.
The Athletics designated Kuhnel for assignment Friday.
The Athletics recalled Alvarado from Triple-A Las Vegas on Friday.
The Astros optioned Dezenzo to Triple-A Sugar Land on Friday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
The Rangers activated Haggerty from the bereavement list Friday and designated him for assignment.
The Cardinals recalled Svanson from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Saggese to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Astros activated Altuve (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Friday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
